what_would_change_our_mind: Pass, revisit only after a verified GitHub profile for the founder is established and independently verified reference checks for the founder's claims of education and location are available.
open_items: Verify the founder's GitHub profile and associated contributions.
Confirm the founder's education at Stanford University with a reference check.
Confirm the founder's location in San Francisco with a reference check.
rationale: The mechanical check reveals one contradicted-tier claim in the founder's assertions with [team-04] showing the founder lacks a verified GitHub profile. When coupled with the contradicted claims regarding the founder's role and education [team-01, team-03], it triggers the integrity gate, meaning the decision is a PASS according to policy. The contradicted claims undermine the trustworthiness needed to justify the high-risk investment at this pre-seed stage. We will revisit only upon verification of the founder's GitHub profile and other personal claims, which are critical for confidence at this stage.
